reviews.comment:
Serca de Dolores , muy buena atención en la carga de nafta y muy amables la gente del coffe, los baños muyyy limpios x lo menos el de hombres , eso sí si te toca cambio de temporada millón personas , pero para cargar NAFTA tenes una persona q te va indicando a qué surtidor podés ir para hacer más rápido

(Translated by Google)
Near Dolores, the service at the gas station is excellent, and the staff at the coffee shop are very friendly. The restrooms are very clean, at least the men's. However, if you go during the change of season, it's incredibly crowded. But when it comes to filling up, there's someone who directs you to the pump for the fastest service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoX2F6QjVRRRAB
